320 I6300_RSPRTRY_FAILR_CD I6300_RSPRTRY_FAILR_CD I6300 Active Diagnoses: Respiratory Failure Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had an active diagnosis of respiratory failure in the last seven days. -=Not assessed/no information
